3c51b4de-d778-4237-9c5d-8007f91e6637.task:
[Phase: Review]

Add an "Activity" page/tab to the Mission Control dashboard (~/.openclaw/extensions/mission-control/web/).

Requirements:
- New sidebar entry "Activity" with the `Activity` (pulse/heartbeat) icon from lucide-react
- Separate from the existing Agents page (which stays as-is for configuration)
- Shows live agent monitoring: main agent state, current activity (tool call / LLM thinking), active subagent runs with kill capability, recent completed runs
- Real-time polling (fast poll ~1.5s when active, slower ~3s when idle)
- Kill button on active subagent runs (calls chat.abort for that subagent's session key — needs a new backend endpoint /api/mc/subagent-abort)
- Activity feed showing recent events across all agents

The existing /api/mc/agent-status endpoint already returns mainAgent state, activity, heartbeat, and subagents (active + recentCompleted). Read the existing AgentsPage.tsx and api.ts to understand what's already there before asking questions.

Review the requirements and ask any clarifying questions. Do NOT start implementation yet.
3c51b4de-d778-4237-9c5d-8007f91e6637.label: activity-tab-review

1061c178-7a36-47dd-bd13-60799f1e9691.task:
[Phase: Execute]

Fix the Activity page in Mission Control — it's rendering as a blank/black page with none of the features visible.

**Location:** ~/.openclaw/extensions/mission-control/web/

**Current state:** ActivityPage.tsx exists at src/components/pages/ActivityPage.tsx (306 lines) with all the right components, but the page renders blank. The build output exists at dist-web/. The sidebar entry works and navigates to the page, but nothing renders.

**Debug and fix:**
1. Check if the page component is actually being rendered (Layout.tsx routing)
2. Check for runtime errors — missing API types, null reference on first render before data loads, etc.
3. Verify api.ts has `agentStatus()` and `subagentAbort()` methods that work
4. Verify the backend `/api/mc/agent-status` and `/api/mc/subagent-abort` endpoints exist in index.ts
5. Fix whatever is broken so the Activity page actually renders with:
   - Main agent live status banner
   - Active subagent runs with kill button
   - Recent completed runs
   - Activity feed
   - Adaptive polling (1.5s active, 3s idle)

**After fixing:** rebuild with `cd ~/.openclaw/extensions/mission-control/web && npm run build`

Then announce: `openclaw system event --text "Activity page fixed and rebuilt" --mode now`
1061c178-7a36-47dd-bd13-60799f1e9691.label: activity-page-fix

The Activity page in Mission Control renders as a completely blank/black page. Debug and fix it.

**Location:** ~/.openclaw/extensions/mission-control/web/

**What exists:**
- ActivityPage.tsx (306 lines) with all components — renders blank
- Layout.tsx routes "activity" → ActivityPage correctly
- api.ts has agentStatus() and subagentAbort()
- Backend index.ts has /api/mc/agent-status and /api/mc/subagent-abort
- Build output at ~/.openclaw/extensions/mission-control/dist-web/

**Likely causes:**
- Runtime JS error on first render (null ref before data loads, missing type, API call failing)
- CSS issue (page renders but content invisible)
- The page's overflow/height not set correctly for the parent container

**Fix it, rebuild, and test:**
```
cd ~/.openclaw/extensions/mission-control/web && npm run build
```

Then: `openclaw system event --text "Activity page fixed" --mode now`
